ew_context: Price breaking above key resistance suggests potential wave 3 or C wave acceleration from recent lows
pattern_desc: Breakout above 97.03 level with 5 prior touches, confirming resistance-to-support flip. Volume expansion supports breakout validity.
invalidation: Break back below 96.19 negates breakout pattern
market_context: Oil supported by Iran Strait of Hormuz control tensions and geopolitical risk premium despite bearish EMA structure
